content.en:
"Lord of the Dark Words, in the future, the treasure land of the Infinite Mountain will be given to you, you enter the Infinite Heaven and Earth to cultivate, and I will practice in this treasure land of the Source Sea in the future. "

Ye Tian said.

For him, the treasure land of Wuliang Mountain is no longer of much use, so he will completely give it to the Lord of Darkness, which will help the Lord of Darkness improve his strength.

"Thank you, Endless Lord!"

The Lord of the Word said excitedly.

The Infinite Heaven and Earth were useless to Ye Tian, but they were of great use to her.

Subsequently, the Lord of the Underworld went to the Infinite Heaven and Earth, while Ye Tian began to study the newly born treasure land of the Source Sea.

Airplanes!

Ye Tian walked into this treasure land.

This treasure land is not small, with a long mountain range, a lot of resources and treasures.

Even, Ye Tian also sensed the existence of three high-level Eternal Treasures, and the Top-Rank Eternal Treasures alone were worthy of the Peak Legendary Realm Lord's competition, but it was not of much use to a Peak Legendary Realm Lord like Ye Tian.

Wow!

Ye Tian instantly shuttled to a small silver-white tree, this silver-white tree was located on top of a mountain peak, exuding silver-white brilliance, 19 silver-white brilliance penetrated time and space, swaying to the surrounding area.

Moreover, it can also penetrate all matter, if it is an ordinary peak Legendary Realm Lord, it really can't grasp this silver-white brilliance.

Ye Tian used the eighth-order Eternal Will to turn into the hand of will, and easily grasped these silver-white brilliance.

Immediately, he incorporated these silvery brilliances into his will.

Suddenly, Ye Tian felt that the will had a slow lifting effect, but the biggest effect of this silver white light was not to enhance the power of the will, but to improve the comprehension and increase the effect of comprehension.

To put it simply, if you comprehend under this small silver-white tree, you can create a space-time mastery technique faster.

"Yes, this little silver-white tree can at least save me a lot of time, and it is very valuable. Moreover, I can also divide this place into areas and let the Legendary Lords of the Terran and the Lords of the Legendary Realm come to enlighten. Although they can't directly refine the Silver Radiance, under the influence of the Silver Radiance, they can also increase the effect of Enlightenment. Ye Tian said darkly.

In addition to this small silver-white tree, this treasure land also has a very precious ore vein, which is also very valuable to the peak Legendary Realm Lord.

Moreover, this treasure land itself contains an abundance of extremely energy, and if you cultivate here, your cultivation speed will be many times faster than that of the outside world.

"In terms of the value of the resources born in this treasure land, it is much more than the resources born in other treasure lands in the Void Region, although these resources are of little use to me, they can cultivate the human race, and this treasure land alone is enough to provide the high-level cultivation of the human race. "

Ye Tian then began to transform this treasure land, and transformed the area where the silver and white trees were located into his own Julu.

From now on, his essence will be here to attain enlightenment.

In a flash, some time passed.

At this time, many people of the human race lived in this treasure land, and a large number of magic circles were arranged by Ye Tian here, even the fourth-level peak Legendary Realm Lord was difficult to sneak into.

Time passed, and another long time passed.

On this day, Ye Tianzai used the comprehension effect of the silver and white tree, and finally created another space-time control technique, this space-time control technique is another space-time control technique deduced and created according to the void walking, the effect is similar to the void walking, but the effect is much stronger.

"Let's call it Void Walking. "

Ye Tian muttered.

With the Void Walk, Ye Tian's strength naturally increased a little.

However, the space-time control skills he can still have are too few, and he is not invincible among the fifth-level peak Legendary Realm Lords, so he needs to create more space-time control skills.

......

Boundary River, Half Tooth Ancient Tower.

At this time, the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower was in an unknown time and space, and other peak Legendary Realm lords and half-step Eternal Masters could not enter, and only Eternal Control could perceive the existence here.

Suddenly, a figure appeared in the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower.

Airplanes!!!

The spirit of the half-tooth ancient tower appeared, and said respectfully: "Master, you have finally returned!"

The man who appeared here was the Half-Tooth Master, who had been missing for countless years, and finally returned today.

"yes, it's been a long time since I've been back. But there is no way, this time I was trapped somewhere, and although I got some benefits, I almost couldn't get out. If you hadn't sent me the news, I wouldn't have made up my mind to use that treasure to get out of trouble. The half-tooth master said.

"Master, this is some information from the past years!"

The machine spirit handed over the information.

The half-tooth master accepted this information, and soon learned of some of the big things that had happened in the Boundary River after he left.

None of the big things interested him, though.

What he was most interested in was the fact that Ye Tian had passed the ninth level of the Banya Ancient Tower, and it was precisely because of this incident that he would choose to return, otherwise, he was afraid that he would come back after a long delay.

"Endless Lord Ye Tian is from the Eternal Realm where the Blue Lotus Controller is located. I didn't expect that the eternal realm where the Qinglian controller was located would give birth to such a demonic genius and comprehend the secret of swallowing. "

"It's a pity, although I later learned that the secret art is the secret of swallowing, I can't understand it. "

"The Secret of Swallowing, one of the ten secret techniques of the Ten Elements Ancestor of the Master, I dreamed of apprenticeship to the Ten Elements Ancestor, but unfortunately I worked hard and worked hard, I only got the title of a registered disciple, and I can never become a personal disciple, and Ye Tian comprehended the secret of Swallowing, so I am qualified to become the personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor!"

The Half-Tooth Holder muttered.

The machine spirit was very curious, and hurriedly asked, "Master, who is the Ten Elements Ancestor, even the master can only be his 733 registered disciple?"

The Half-Tooth Master didn't have to tell a machine spirit, but the Half-Tooth Ancient Tower's machine spirit had followed him for countless years, and the relationship was not ordinary, so he explained: "The Eternal Ruler is the highest level of Boundary River cultivation, and there is no road on it. However, the Ten Elements are very few great beings who have carved out half a path upwards in the realm of the Eternal Master. His majestic figure exists in many timelines of the Boundary River, reflecting all time and space, and even I hardly see him. "

"It turned out to be such a great being!"

The machine spirit was shocked.

"Master has promised that if I find a personal disciple for him, the name of my registered disciple can be removed. However, the requirements of the master are too high, and understanding the secret of swallowing is only one of the requirements for becoming a disciple. However, Ye Tian has some hope and can invest in one or two. The half-tooth master said.

"The master is going to see that Ye Tian?"

The machine spirit asked.

"Well, let's go and meet each other, in case the other party really becomes the personal disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor, even I have to call him Senior Brother. Still, there was little hope for him. Of course, if the other party wants to become the eternal master, there is still a lot of hope, and how can he become a registered disciple of the Ten Elements Ancestor when the time comes, it is worth seeing me. "

Go ahead.

The Half-Tooth Master traveled through time and space, crossed the long boundary river, and descended on the Blue Lotus Giant City. _
